title: Alarms and cameras
seoTitle: Alarms and CCTV/IP cameras in Blanes | Instal Berrozpe
seoDescription: Alarms and CCTV/IP cameras in Blanes and Girona with Instal Berrozpe. Security solutions for homes or businesses.
heroTitle: Alarms and cameras for homes and businesses
intro: Security systems with alarms and CCTV/IP cameras for homes or businesses.
summary: Alarms, CCTV cameras and IP cameras in one technical security line.

benefits.title: Key points
items: Makes it possible to address security and supervision within one service line.
The current structure positions it for homes or businesses depending on context.
It can connect naturally with electrical work or home automation when required.

process.title: Service process
items: You explain the security or supervision need.
The system that best fits the space and expected use is reviewed.
The alarm or camera installation is coordinated.
If services need to be combined, the enquiry can be expanded.

items.question: What is included in this service?
items.answer: The current website separates alarms, CCTV cameras and IP cameras within the same security service line.

items.question: Is remote access mentioned?
items.answer: Yes. The current presentation associates IP cameras with image access through the internet.

items.question: Can this be combined with other technical work?
items.answer: Yes. In many cases this line is related to electrical and home automation work or to other installation needs.

cta.title: Tell us what you need in alarms or cameras
cta.body: If you want to assess a security system for a home or business, write to us and we will guide you.
cta.label: Request a quote

pendingConfirmation: Confirm whether any legacy reference to brands or monitoring stations should remain.
Validate any additional operational promise before production.
